# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.
# Category: message_queue_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: sqs-queue 
  labels:
    app: hello-sqs-app
spec:  
  containers: 
  - image: quay.io/cloudservicesplatform/hello-sqs-app-py:latest
    name: hello-sqs-app-container
    ports: 
    - containerPort: 80
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sqs-queue 
  labels:
    app: hello-sqs-app
spec:  
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80  
      protocol: TCP 
      name: hello-sqs-app-port      
---
apiVersion: v2
kind: ManagedPolicy
metadata:
  name: sqs-policy 
spec: 
  service_account_name: hello-sqs-svcacc  
  permissions:
  - action: [ 'sqs:*' ]  
    resource: "*"
